subject: Delivery of The Times: 50% off for 26 weeks, plus free digital access
body:
View in browser:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTDJP6B81HXJB84duyAAwENcRp/viwb?t_params=I_UNSUB_LINK%3D0%26EMAIL%3Djeeproject%2540yahoo.com%26REGI_ID%3D47275261

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Subscribe to The Times and Save
50% FOR 26 WEEKS
On Home Delivery Plus FREE Digital Access

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTDJP6B81HXJB84duyAAwENcRp/sub1

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Dear New York Times Reader, 

Subscribe to home delivery, with free digital access, to get 
in-depth coverage of news and issues important to you. 

When you subscribe, you'll enjoy: 

-- The convenience of early morning newspaper delivery

-- FREE online access to NYTimes.com and FREE apps for your 
smartphone and tablet
-- FREE access to Today's Paper web app for desktops 
and tablets

-- FREE additional log in, so a friend or family member can 
also enjoy FREE digital access

Don't miss this great offer to benefit from all The Times has to 
offer at an exceptional value. 

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTDJP6B81HXJB84duyAAwENcRp/sub2

-----------------------------------------------------------------
You received this email because you are a registered user of 
The New York Times. 

Mobile apps are not supported on all devices. Does not include 
e-reader editions, Premium Crosswords or Times Crosswords apps. 
Promotional offer valid for new subscribers in areas served by 
The New York Times Delivery Service. At the end of your 26-week 
period, delivery will continue at the regular rate unless you 
notify us. State and local taxes will be added where applicable. 
Other restrictions apply. Offer expires on April 30, 2014. 

To ensure delivery of emails from The New York Times, please add 
nytimes@e.newyorktimesinfo.com to your address book. 

Privacy Policy:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTDJP6B81HXJB84duyAAwENcRp/privacy

Contact Us:
help@nytimes.com

Unsubscribe:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTDJP6B81HXJB84duyAAwENcRp/unsub2?EMAIL=jeeproject@yahoo.com&REGI_ID=47275261

Copyright 2014 The New York Times Company
P.O. Box 8041, Davenport, IA 52808-8041
